title: centaurea nigrescens var. microptilon
intro: Centaurea nigrescens var. microptilon, also known as the small-flowered knapweed, is a perennial plant in the aster family native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Centaurea nigrescens var. microptilon is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
